content:
🌟 tegaki | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Creating animated handwriting effects for text on the web, enhancing user interfaces with a dynamic and personalized touch.
✨ Key Features: • Animates any font into handwriting • No manual path authoring required • No native dependencies • Supports React, Svelte, Vue, SolidJS, Astro, Web Components, and Vanilla JS • Bundled handwriting fonts available
📖 Summary: Tegaki is a TypeScript library that animates any font to appear as if it's being written by hand. It requires no manual path authoring and supports integration with major web frameworks like React, Svelte, Vue, and SolidJS, as well as Vanilla JS and Web Components.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
